payload: Query the new /api/health/diagnostic endpoint and verify it correctly reports: (1) DB hostname resolution failure when DNS unreachable, (2) TCP reachability=false when port blocked, (3) env vars correctly detected, (4) monitor state accurate. Compare against /api/health for consistency.

Use the diagnostic endpoint output to pinpoint the DB connection failure mode. Is it DNS (hostname not resolvable from Zeabur container), TCP (port blocked by firewall), or auth (bad credentials)? Check Zeabur DATABASE_URL env var and verify it matches the PostgreSQL service in the same project.

Add a /api/health/startup-log endpoint that captures and returns the last 50 lines of startup logs (DB connection attempt, monitor launch, price cache init). This complements the diagnostic endpoint with historical data.
